customManagers.description: Bump npm dependency pins inside the copier-templated package.json.jinja
Track engines.node in package.json.jinja with the node datasource so it bumps in lockstep with template/.nvmrc (handled by the nvm manager).

packageRules.description: Auto-merge the agent-skills bump so it lands without a manual PR merge; release-please then cuts the patch.
Bump the kysely ecosystem as one PR. kysely 0.x minors are breaking and kysely-ctl/kysely-codegen pin a kysely range, so splitting them lands a kysely the migration CLI can't import.
Bump Node together everywhere — template/.nvmrc (nvm) and package.json.jinja engines.node (custom manager) — so dev/CI and the DO deploy version never drift apart.
